title: 8PCS Bamboo Knitting Needles, 10mm, 8mm, 6mm, 4mm Knitting Needles Set, Single Pointed Knob Top Wooden, for DIY Handmade Blanket Sweater Scarf for Beginner, Beginner
features: Versatile Sizing Options:8 PCS straight knitting needles with diameters of 10mm, 8mm, 6mm, and 4mm length,comfortable to hold,single ended knitting needle is ideal for a variety of patterns and projects,Two for each size,catering to a variety of project requirements.
Premium Bamboo:Made from warm, durable carbonized bamboo,these wooden needles are lightweight and smooth.They provide a comfortable grip, ideal for reducing strain during long knitting sessions.
Design: These knitting needles are ergonomically designed to feel comfortable in your hand.It is designed with a mushroom head at the top to ensure that they do not fall off easily during use.

Durable Wooden Excellence: Our extra long wooden knitting needles are crafted for efficient knitting with chunky wool for knitting.These lightweight, durable, and comfortable needles elevate your knitting journey, ideal for both short and long wooden knitting needles.

Ideal for Knitting Enthusiasts: Whether you're working on scarves, hats, or sweaters, this set meets various knitting needs;The natural bamboo material and thoughtful design make these needles a reliable choice for your crafting projects.
